title: Phantoms See Phantoms [Origins Addon]
description: Makes the origin "Phantom" be able to see other phantoms while in the phasing state
body:
Phantoms See Phantoms

This mod allows the vanilla origin "Phantom" to see other phantoms while in the phasing/invisibility state.

You will see other phantoms like you do in spectator mode, slightly transparent.

 

Custom Origins:

This is not a custom power type yet but you can add the power: `phantomsseephantoms:see_invisible` to your origin json. (Note: Any origin with this power will be able to see eachother)
